nasb.text: They said, “There must be an inheritance for the survivors of Benjamin, so that a tribe will not be blotted out from Israel.

esv.text: And they said, “There must be an inheritance for the survivors of Benjamin, that a tribe not be blotted out from Israel.

cnv.text: 又說：“便雅憫逃脫的人應有地業，免得有個支派從以色列中被消滅。

ccb.text: 便雅悯的余民必须成家立后，以免以色列失去一个支派。
